updates.title: April 23, 2026
updates.body: projects.trollrunner.net has been created. An art-inspired Strava run course...

updates.title: April 21, 2026
updates.body: Added more "troll" songs to Ole Troll playlist. Give it a listen while trolling around this website!

updates.title: April 18, 2026
updates.body: All sticker images fully uploaded ;) including today's. One away from 100... A thousand more miles before I ever think about giving up on my community. I remain frustrated with trying to get the syncing. Now I have to copy pasta this same update message for mobile devices...

updates.title: April 16, 2026
updates.body:
- Added "Live: Currently trolling around" sign spotted below the subdomain buttons "Blog, Nutrition, Finance".
- Noticed $TROLL balance and USD value doesn't show up sometimes despite waiting a minute after refreshing... monitoring the trollituation (ok i tried to combine troll with situation.... bad joke).
- Looked into improving UI for finance.trollrunner.net. Added copy fund wallet address button.
- Shared backend sync for "Latest Update" needs further investigating.

updates.title: April 13, 2026
updates.body: Starting to look into the issue of "Latest Updates" not syncing from laptop to mobile devices. :( I want y'all to get the latest updates duhhh.

updates.title: April 12, 2026
updates.body:
Took two days off working on the site, came back for some late night web-building for a couple hours... *yawnnnnnnnnnn*...
- Built finance.trollrunner.net, tried to add section where transfer autopopulate but had some trouble.
- I did however fix the issue of having updated price action (amount of $TROLL correlating to current USD prices, quite the hurdle).
- Started building blog.trollrunner.net. Lots planned for this. If you read this throw some tokens into the funding wallet ;) Trololololololo
